flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Cochise County Community College District fell 24% between 2009 and 2010 (6.7% → 5.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cochise County Community College District fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cochise County Community College District fell 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.2k → $6.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Cochise County Community College District rose 14% between 2020 and 2023 (61.9% → 70.7%).
